backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Smart Money Vault backend, implementing user profile management, license tracking, trade storage, bot authentication, access control, and Stripe/HTTP outcall integrations.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, hooks, screens, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Smart Money Vault frontend, mounting the React app at the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/index.ts: TypeScript type export defining the SignalFetchResult discriminated union with ok (statusCode, body, timestamp) and err (BotError) variants.
frontend/PHASE1_BACKEND_IMPLEMENTATION_C: Granular step-by-step checklist for implementing Phase 1 backend features (user profiles, bot auth, audit logging, admin dashboard) in Motoko, organized into 11 sections with 189 atomic testable items.
frontend/ROADMAP_BATCH_EXECUTION.md: Detailed batch execution plan for implementing roadmap Phases 3–8 of Smart Money Vault, covering the Connect Wizard, Settings Page, Ed25519 key generation, subscription tiers, trading engine, and institutional hardening.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that handles authentication state, showing a landing screen for unauthenticated users, a profile setup modal for new users, and the main AppShell wrapped in ToastProvider for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/analytics/Analyt: A slide-out sheet component that displays analytics events in two tabs (local and backend), with color-coded badges and icons per event type.
A small ghost button with a bar chart icon that serves as the entry point to open the analytics drawer.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: A login/logout button using Internet Identity authentication, showing loading, signed-in, and signed-out states.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that collects a display name and optional account identifier to create a new user profile on first login.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: A centered screen shown when a user lacks access, displaying an error icon and a sign-in button if unauthenticated.
frontend/src/components/common/LoadingSk: Exports reusable skeleton placeholder components (card, table, form, chart, page) for loading states throughout the UI.
frontend/src/components/common/StateMess: A generic centered message component for empty or error states, supporting a title, description, and optional action button.
frontend/src/components/common/ToastProv: A context-based toast notification system that renders success, error, and info toasts at the top-center of the screen with auto-dismiss after 5 seconds.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AuditL: A dashboard panel that fetches and displays audit log entries in a scrollable table, with loading skeleton and error/empty state handling.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Renders the top navigation header for the Smart Money Vault app, including nav buttons for different screens, admin/settings links, analytics entrypoint, and an onboarding tour launcher.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Equity: Displays a composed line/area chart of the user's equity curve over time, fetched via useGetEquityCurve, with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LiveLo: Shows a terminal-style live log panel that displays timestamped status messages and allows triggering a connectivity test via a button.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LivePu: Functionally identical to LiveLogsPanel, rendering a live pulse terminal with periodic uplink status pings and a connectivity test button.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Perfor: Renders an area chart of the equity curve as a 'Performance Telemetry' panel, with skeleton loading, error, and empty state handling.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/System: Displays bot status (online/offline), license validity, ICP cycles, and last heartbeat time fetched from the heartbeat hook, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Uplink: Dashboard card component that displays and toggles the bot's uplink status (EXECUTE/STANDBY) using a switch control, with loading and error states.
Root layout component that manages client-side routing between screens (dashboard, trades, admin, settings, etc.) via URL hash/path, renders the header, and tracks navigation analytics.
frontend/src/components/settings/AdminTi: Settings panel that fetches and displays subscription tier configurations in a table, showing tier name, status, price, bot/API call limits, and features.
frontend/src/components/settings/Connect: Settings panel showing the bot's current public key and URL connection status, with a button to open the ConnectBotWizardModal for configuration.
Multi-step wizard modal that generates an Ed25519 keypair via the Web Crypto API, displays the private key for copying, then links the public key and bot HTTPS URL to the backend.
frontend/src/components/settings/Profile: Settings form for editing the user's display name, account ID, timezone, and notification preferences, with read-only display of their Internet Identity principal.
frontend/src/components/settings/StripeC: A modal form component for configuring Stripe integration, accepting a secret key and allowed countries with validation, then submitting via the useSetStripeConfiguration hook.
frontend/src/components/settings/Subscri: Displays subscription tier cards (with fallbacks) and handles Stripe checkout session creation, admin Stripe config modal, and onboarding tour step registration for the settings screen.
frontend/src/components/tour/OnboardingT: React context provider that manages onboarding tour state (active step, navigation, completion) with localStorage persistence, step registration, and an overlay tooltip UI.
frontend/src/components/tour/types.ts: TypeScript type definitions for TourStep (step metadata including screen, target element, placement) and TourState (active status, current index, completed steps).
frontend/src/components/tour/useOnboardi: Re-exports the useOnboardingTour hook from OnboardingTourProvider as a standalone module for convenient import.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Provides React Query hooks for admin operations: checking caller admin status, listing all licenses, and creating/updating/revoking licenses via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAnalytics.ts: Client-side analytics hook that records, stores (up to 100 events), and clears local analytics events persisted in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditLedger.ts: React Query hook that fetches a paginated audit log from the backend actor, refreshing every 10 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendAnalytics.t: React Query hooks for retrieving and storing analytics events on the ICP backend actor, with cache invalidation on mutation success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: React Query hooks for fetching and saving the authenticated caller's user profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useEquityCurve.ts: Derives an equity curve data series by accumulating PnL from paginated closed trades, starting from a baseline equity of 10,000.
frontend/src/hooks/useFetchSignalsTest.t: Mutation hook that triggers a backend connectivity test by calling fetchSignals, then shows a success or error toast with the HTTP status and response size.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartbeat.ts: Provides a React Query hook to fetch heartbeat data for a given account ID from the actor, polling every 10 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useLicense.ts: Provides a React Query hook to fetch the current user's license status from the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkBotPublicKey.t: Provides a mutation hook to register a bot public key via the actor, invalidating relevant queries and showing toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveLogs.ts: Provides a React Query hook to fetch the latest 50 paginated trades for the current user, refreshing every 5 seconds as a live feed.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetBotUrl.ts: Provides a mutation hook to set the bot URL via the actor, with client-side HTTPS validation and toast feedback on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useStripe.ts: Provides React Query hooks and mutations for Stripe integration, including checking configuration, setting configuration, creating checkout sessions, and retrieving session status.
frontend/src/hooks/useTiers.ts: Provides React Query hooks to list all subscription tiers or fetch a single tier by ID from the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrades.ts: Provides a React Query hook to fetch paginated trades filtered by account ID and optional time range.
frontend/src/hooks/useUplink.ts: Provides hooks to fetch the bot profile and toggle the uplink state, with query invalidation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind CSS styles and CSS custom properties for the app's dark charcoal terminal theme with emerald accent colors.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/screens/AdminScreen.tsx: Admin panel screen for managing user licenses, allowing admins to create, toggle, or revoke licenses via a form and table UI with onboarding tour support.
frontend/src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx: Main dashboard screen composing uplink control, system heartbeat, live trade terminal, performance telemetry, and audit ledger panels with onboarding tour steps.
frontend/src/screens/OverviewScreen.tsx: Displays the user's license status and account information in a card layout, with an onboarding tour step registered for the license card.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentFailureScree: Full-page screen shown after a failed or cancelled Stripe payment, logging analytics events and offering retry or dashboard navigation buttons.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentSuccessScree: Full-page screen shown after a successful Stripe payment, logging analytics events and providing a button to return to the dashboard.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx: Tabbed settings page with Profile, Connect Bot, Subscription, and (for admins) Admin Tiers panels.
frontend/src/screens/TradesScreen.tsx: Paginated trade history screen with account ID and time-range filters, displaying trades in a table with P&L and onboarding tour steps.
frontend/src/utils/actorErrorMessage.ts: Normalizes canister/actor errors into user-friendly messages by matching known error patterns like busy canister, network issues, or unauthorized access.
frontend/src/utils/encoding.ts: Provides utility functions to convert between hex strings and Uint8Array byte arrays.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Provides helpers to format nanosecond timestamps into locale strings and calculate P&L from trade entry/exit prices and size.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Smart Money Vault frontend, defining dark mode, custom color palette (emerald, charcoal, profit/loss using oklch variables), typography, animations, and container query plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for Smart Money Vault, documenting architecture (single Motoko canister + React frontend), hardcoded admin principals, stable storage design, and a pending feature request to add a new admin principal.
